title: ferray-ma: no indexing/slicing support on MaskedArray
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's MaskedArray supports all ndarray indexing: integer indexing, slicing, fancy indexing, boolean indexing. All return MaskedArrays with appropriate mask slices. ferray-ma has no indexing methods — you can't slice a MaskedArray or get a single element. Users must index data() and mask() separately and recombine. Add at least: index_axis, slice_axis, get, and boolean_index that return MaskedArrays with corresponding mask slices.
